description: Court record. Dating: mentions Nisan 1410 Seleucid = March/April 1099 CE (terminus ante quem). Dealing with a complicated lawsuit of a case in which Abū l-Faḍl had sold 91 jars of wine to Hillel b. Yosef for 9 dinars. (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, p. 256, and from Goitein's index cards.) Related to the second entry of CUL Add.3413 (PGPID 3968).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-15. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
